Package com.marswars.swerve_lib

Class SwerveMech

java.lang.Object
com.marswars.mechanisms.MechBase
com.marswars.swerve_lib.SwerveMech
All Implemented Interfaces:
SubsystemIoBase
public class SwerveMech extends MechBase
Mechanism implementation for a four-module swerve drivetrain.

    Method
    Description
    ChassisSpeeds
    getChassisSpeeds()
    Returns the measured chassis speeds of the robot.
    Rotation3d
    getGyroRotation()
    Returns the gyro rotation as a Rotation3d containing pitch, yaw, and roll.
    Rotation2d
    getGyroYaw()
    Returns the raw gyro rotation used for odometry.
    double
    getGyroYawRate()
    Returns the gyro yaw rate in radians per second.

    Returns the swerve drive kinematics instance
    SwerveModulePosition[]
    getModulePositions()
    Returns the module positions of the swerve drive.
    Module[]
    getModules()
    Returns the array of swerve modules in order (FL, FR, BL, BR).
    SwerveModuleState[]
    getModuleStates()
    Returns the module states of the swerve drive.

  • Constructor Details

    • SwerveMech

      public SwerveMech(String logging_prefix, SwerveDriveConfig config)
      Creates a new swerve mechanism using the provided drivetrain configuration.
      Parameters:
      logging_prefix - Logging prefix for telemetry
      config - Drivetrain configuration

  • Method Details

    • readInputs

      public void readInputs(double timestamp)
      Read inputs from hardware or simulation
      Parameters:
      timestamp - the current timestamp

    • writeOutputs

      Parameters:
      timestamp - the current timestamp

      Log data to NetworkTables or other logging systems

      public void setChassisRequest(ChassisRequest request)

      request -

    • setChassisRequestParameters

      public void setChassisRequestParameters(Pose2d pose, Rotation2d operator_forward_direction)
      Sets the chassis request parameters for the swerve drive.
      Parameters:
      pose - The current robot pose.
      operator_forward_direction - The operator's forward direction.

    • setGyroYaw

      public void setGyroYaw(Rotation2d yaw)
      Sets the gyro yaw position.
      Parameters:
      yaw - The desired yaw rotation.

    • setModuleOffsets

      public void setModuleOffsets()
      Stores the current encoder readings as offsets

    • setNeutralMode

      public void setNeutralMode(com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.NeutralModeValue mode)
      Sets the neutral mode for all swerve modules.
      Parameters:
      mode - The desired neutral mode

    • getModules

      public Module[] getModules()
      Returns the array of swerve modules in order (FL, FR, BL, BR).
      Returns:
      the module array

    • getChassisSpeeds

      public ChassisSpeeds getChassisSpeeds()
      Returns the measured chassis speeds of the robot.
      Returns:
      ChassisSpeeds object representing the robot's chassis speeds

    • getModuleStates

      public SwerveModuleState[] getModuleStates()
      Returns the module states of the swerve drive.
      Returns:
      SwerveModuleState[] array of module states

    • getModulePositions

      public SwerveModulePosition[] getModulePositions()
      Returns the module positions of the swerve drive.
      Returns:
      SwerveModulePosition[] array of module positions

    • getGyroYaw

      public Rotation2d getGyroYaw()
      Returns the raw gyro rotation used for odometry.
      Returns:
      Rotation2d representing the raw gyro rotation

    • getGyroYawRate

      public double getGyroYawRate()
      Returns the gyro yaw rate in radians per second.
      Returns:
      yaw rate in radians per second

    • getGyroRotation

      public Rotation3d getGyroRotation()
      Returns the gyro rotation as a Rotation3d containing pitch, yaw, and roll.
      Returns:
      Rotation3d representing the gyro rotation

    • getKinematics

      public SwerveDriveKinematics getKinematics()
      Returns the swerve drive kinematics instance
      Returns:
      SwerveDriveKinematics object representing the swerve drive
